item.title: Their tactics
item.dc:creator: GullahGullahIslander

item.title: I try to post this every year
item.description: I try to post this every year, and leave a little spiel. About how we must never forget. And do better every year. This time around, it’s a little hard. I’m already worn thin, like a pad of butter over to much bread. But that feeling will pass, and the fight has not yet been won. Or lost. So I pull myself together, and say to you “we must remember”
item.dc:creator: sevenfingerman

item.description: We need to turn the country off then back on again. There is a movement forming, we need 11 million people to make a substantial impact. https://generalstrikeus.com/

item.title: Cosmopolis - The Gorgon and the Mountain Troll Collection
item.description: All the strips with Natricia the gorgon and Jasper the mountain troll, chronological rather than order of release. I have a lot of plans for these characters, including a couple miniseries where they meet each others' families. Webtoon: https://www.webtoons.com/en/canvas/cosmopolis/list?title_no=913270 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/pixels_pens/ Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/pixels_pens
item.dc:creator: pixelspens

item.title: Wednesday Memes for the Memeless
item.description:
Can say from experience, the 40s can be rough at times
Thanks for joining me again for another Wednesday dump! May your days be righteous and may all of the good things happen to you!
item.dc:creator: Ashnak83

item.title: Rated R for Rrriot! 17
item.description:
Hey veryon!! i'm cuff, and these are some of my scavenged memes! Can you spot a theme??
ACAB
Especially.
Want some more dank anarchemes? Here's the rest of the Rated R for Rrriots!! 17: https://imgur.com/gallery/7Pm1T2F 15: https://imgur.com/gallery/U4aEQP2 14: https://imgur.com/gallery/yRYykgY 13: https://imgur.com/gallery/SR12p5j 12: https://imgur.com/gallery/0lUcv7g 11: https://imgur.com/gallery/lflsY2P 10: https://imgur.com/gallery/bRsAC2y 9: https://imgur.com/gallery/I16fkw4 8: https://imgur.com/gallery/umqrttD 7: https://imgur.com/gallery/ytPhuAm 6: https://imgur.com/gallery/Nb9AfUg 5: https://imgur.com/gallery/CpoQ2By 4: https://imgur.com/gallery/yEYMMpE 3: https://imgur.com/gallery/39plkEg 2: https://imgur.com/gallery/ask655J 1: https://imgur.com/gallery/AhgslD5 Are you looking for a new queer server to chat in Discord? Rated R for Rrriot! is a queer community that values social revolution, queer liberation, solidarity, DIY, gaming, groups where we can all feel safer, and -- of course -- dank memes. You will need to write a short introduction to get access to most of the channels in the server. We're restricted to 18+ years of age. You can find us on Disboard: https://disboard.org/server/1072508608169906260
item.dc:creator: CuffScout

item.title: People are stupid but funny
item.description: I uploaded this because they need to learn math
item.dc:creator: lminer

item.title: In case you needed another reason to be grateful you’re not an American…
item.description: As a female that survived a violent SA that left me for dead next to some train tracks and while in recovery (physically and mentally) found out I was pregnant. I do not share this with anyone outside of my family (my son is 29 now and does know as I don’t hide anything from my children but makes sure that he knows that he is loved beyond measure) but I got justice. WTF HAPPENED TO US?! When will this end? I’m so saddened by who we are and what they allow..please know that in spite of all this- I do still keep hope and love alive by “looking for the helpers” *EDIT* after reading comments I see that these are not American Judges. My apologies for not noticing- I’ll still die on this hill.
item.dc:creator: itsanoforme

item.title: Bun. Apply directly to the forehead.
item.dc:creator: Yakeshinu

item.title: National Day of Remembrance
item.description: Today is the national day of remembrance for the US Government arresting and interning hundreds of thousands of Americans in concentration camps because of an Executive Order On this day in 1942 FDR signed EO9066 that authorized the interenment of over a hundred thousand Americans of Japanese ancestry (as well as many Alaska Natives) in concentration camps in the desert. I fear we are going to see this again, soon.
item.dc:creator: LitchLitch

item.title: Tesla Autopilot is defective so says the court
item.dc:creator: turbolento4r1v2000

item.title: Situation update
item.description: Update to my last post, where I talk about upcoming job and being shuffled around at shelters and peoples couches. I finally got a room through governmental help. Thanks guys for sorting me out with food and stuff on the kofi I posted in my bio. I didn't have anything, and I felt like giving up on everything. The help given really did and still does make a big difference to me right now. Thank you for keeping me fed. I cannot wait to start my job and get the paycheck in the end of March. I would not have been able to get this far without the help of the kind people on here.
item.dc:creator: ccdog03
